title: Repo Local Guidance
description: Canonical specialist for thin-root local AGENTS guidance with longer support docs under .agents and local-only git exclusion.
scope_boundary: In scope: thin root AGENTS guidance, .agents support docs, local-only ignore setup, and maintenance of repo-local operator guidance. Out of scope: tracked repo governance unless explicitly requested.

stable_facts.statement: Root AGENTS.md stays at repo root because Codex auto-loads repo guidance from AGENTS.md, not from .agents/.
.agents/ is the correct place for longer repo-local support docs when root AGENTS.md should stay thin.
.git/info/exclude is the correct local-only ignore mechanism for AGENTS.md and .agents/ when they must not be pushed.
